name: Mickey Cobras
description: The Mickey Cobras are a Chicago gang affiliated with the People Nation, originally founded in 1954 as the Egyptian King Cobras on Chicago's West Side. Named after leader Henry 'Mickey' Cogwell who was assassinated by Jeff Fort in 1977 for refusing to join the El Rukns. Their colors are green, black, and red. Allied with the Chicago Outfit (organized crime link documented since 1970). They operated a large-scale heroin ring netting over $100,000/week until the 2001 federal prosecution of 15 members. Described by US Attorney Patrick Fitzgerald as one of Chicago's 'super-gangs.'

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia
